name: Nurse Assignment - CR2
content: The one-zone-per-nurse restriction is relaxed: nurses may care for patients from multiple zones. A distance matrix between zones defines travel effort. The travel cost of a nurse is induced by patients from different zones assigned to that same nurse. The objective is updated to jointly minimize total workload and total travel cost.
value_info: `min_patients_per_nurse`: Minimum number of patients per nurse.
`max_patients_per_nurse`: Maximum number of patients per nurse.
`max_workload_per_nurse`: Upper bound on workload per nurse.
`patient_acuity`: List[int], workload contribution of each patient.
`patient_zone`: List[int], zone index of each patient.
`zone_distance`: 2D List[int], where zone_distance[z1][z2] is travel distance between zones z1 and z2.

var1.descr: `patient_assignment`: List[int] of length n_patients, where patient_assignment[i] is the assigned nurse for patient i.

var2.descr: `workload`: List[int] of length n_nurses, workload per nurse from assigned patient acuities.

var4.descr: `total_travel_cost`: Integer travel-cost term based on inter-zone distances among patients assigned to the same nurse.
